description: Environment setup - install dependencies, verify baseline build and tests pass
steps: Run dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln to install all NuGet dependencies
Run dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln to confirm the project builds cleanly
Run dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln to confirm all existing 38+ tests pass
Install CDK CLI via npm install -g aws-cdk and run npx cdk synth to confirm synthesis works
acceptance_criteria: dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln succeeds with no errors
dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln passes all existing tests
npx cdk synth produces CloudFormation template output without errors
findings: All 45 tests pass and cdk synth works. IMPORTANT: NODE_OPTIONS env var is set to '--require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js' in this sandbox but the file does not exist. This causes JSII child process to crash. Must use 'unset NODE_OPTIONS' before running dotnet test or npx cdk synth. CDK CLI installed globally via npm.
